# AI Workflows by Incrementic

This file provides system context and guidelines for LLMs, coding agents, and developer tools working in this repository.

## Repository Overview
- **Name**: AI Workflows by Incrementic
- **Website**: https://aiworkflows.vercel.app
- **Purpose**: A Docusaurus-powered curriculum and guide repository for developers learning local AI workflows, context engineering, and agent orchestration.

---

## Brand Guidelines (Incrementic Stack)
When modifying components, layouts, or pages, you must adhere to the Incrementic brand guidelines:

- **Typography**:
  - Headings: `Sora`, system-ui, sans-serif
  - Body: `Inter`, system-ui, sans-serif
  - Monospace: `IBM Plex Mono`, monospace
- **Color Tokens**:
  - Accent / Primary: `#EA5148` (Incrementic Red)
  - Neutral / Text: `#4C4E56` (Charcoal)
  - Dark Mode Background: `#2B2C31` (Ink)
  - Borders: `#E6E6E8` (Hair)
  - Light Containers: `#FAFAFA` (Soft)
- **Preferred Background**: White (`#FFFFFF`) for light mode. Only recolor the logo in Red, Charcoal, or White.

---

## Tech Stack & Architecture
- **Framework**: Docusaurus 3 (TypeScript / React)
- **Styling**: Vanilla CSS with Infima theme variables (no Tailwind CSS)
- **Environment**: Node.js >=20.0 (packaged with npm)

### Important Directories:
- [`/docs/`](file:///Users/davidbain/aiworkflows/docs/): Primary documentation repository.
- [`/docs/curriculum/`](file:///Users/davidbain/aiworkflows/docs/curriculum/): Step-by-step developer curriculum (concepts, using skills, creating skills, hermes-tailscale setup, and Claude API guides).
- [`/src/css/custom.css`](file:///Users/davidbain/aiworkflows/src/css/custom.css): Styling override entries and core brand CSS variables.
- [`/static/img/`](file:///Users/davidbain/aiworkflows/static/img/): Assets folder containing brand logos and favicons.

---

## Rules of Engagement for Coding Agents
1. **Plain over Clever**: Say the thing. Do not write overly complicated abstractions or custom libraries where plain code works.
2. **Strict CSS**: Use variables defined in `custom.css` (`var(--incrementic-red)`, etc.). Do not hardcode HEX codes.
3. **No Tailwind**: Do not install or use Tailwind utility classes in React components. Stick to Docusaurus class naming conventions and Infima components.
4. **Verification**: Always run `npm run build` and ensure the static build completes successfully without broken markdown links or TypeScript errors before declaring a task complete.
